headline: Check verified tip lines before you reach out
subtext: The public directory helps sources compare verified profiles and choose a tip line that matches the person they need.
image_alt_text: Social graphic built around a desktop Hush Line directory screen on the Verified tab. The image shows a list of verified recipient profiles with search and filtering controls above the results.

social.bluesky: Need to verify who you're contacting before you send a tip? Hush Line's public directory shows verified profiles so you can compare recipients first. Learn more at https://hushline.app/.
social.linkedin: When you need to contact a journalist, lawyer, or other trusted recipient, the first question is whether you found the right person. Hush Line's public directory lets you browse verified profiles before you send anything, so you can check who runs the tip line and choose a better match for your situation. Learn more at https://hushline.app/.
social.mastodon: If you're deciding where to send a tip, Hush Line's public directory helps you start with verified profiles. You can compare recipients and check who runs the tip line before you reach out. Learn more at https://hushline.app/.

rationale: This choice uses the strongest public screenshot from the latest release and reflects the recent guest screenshot fixes in PRs #1765 and #1763. It also matches a core documented Hush Line need: sources should be able to verify they reached the right recipient through verified accounts and public profile details. Choosing a public directory screen also avoids repeating yesterday's onboarding theme.
copy_brief: Write for sources and public users evaluating or using Hush Line.

matched_pull_requests.title: Fix guest profile screenshot manifest reset logic

title: Directory - Verified
